titleStmt.title: SII 34.267: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 267. Tiruvaranguḷam, Alangudi Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the west wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Haratīrthēśvara temple.

summary.p: This records that the naṭṭār of Teṉ-Kavi-nāḍu decided to give the village of Kuḷattūr with all its tax dues, including kaḍamai and achchuvari for celebrating a festival and a service in the name of the chief Arasagaṇḍarāmaṉ, a sāmanta, to be celebrated on the day of his natal star Śatabhishaj in the month of Puraṭṭādi. Several vēḷāṉs are found among the signatories of the document, obviously the members of the nāṭṭār body.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīvīrapāṇṭiya tEvaṟku yāṇṭu 4- tu teṉkavināṭṭu nāṭāy Icai
nta nāṭṭōm Uṭaiyār tiruvaraṉkuḷamuṭaiya nāyaṉārṟkku cāmantaṉār tirunakṣatram cataiyam tīrttamā
ka kaṇṭa puraṭṭātit tirunāḷāṉa Aracakaṇṭarāmaṉ tirunāḷukkum Aracakaṇṭarāman cantikkum nāṅkaḷ
nāṭāy Icainta nāṭṭōm viṭṭa Inṉāṭṭuk kuḷattūr nāṉ kellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nilattukku kavināṭ
ṭu nāṭu Icainta kaṭamai Accuvari maṟṟum Eppēṟpaṭṭaṉavum Iṉta Aracakaṇṭarāmaṉ tirunāḷukkum A
racakaṇṭarāma cantikkum Eṭukiṟa Uṭaiyār tiruvarankuḷamuṭaiyār tirumalaiyilē kallilum cempilum
veṭṭikkuṭuttōm teṉkavināṭṭu nāṭāka Icainta nāṭṭōm Uṭaiyār tiruvaraṉ kuḷamuṭaiya nāyaṉā
ṟkku Ippaṭikku Ivai muṭikoṇṭa cōḻa teṉkavināṭṭu vēḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku cempiya te
ṉ kavināṭṭukkōṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kulōttuṅkacōḻa vēḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai mum
muṭi cōḻavalla nāṭṭu vēḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Aravaṉ vēḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai villavarāya
ṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai periyaracaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai vēḷāṉ periyakaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai
vēḷā civa periyāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Aravaṉ paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Aravaṉ Iṭaṅ
koṇṭāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai piḷḷaiyaṉ periyāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai vēḷāṉ tēvaṉ Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku Ivai mummuṭi cōḻa teṉkavināṭṭu vēḷān Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai tēvaṉ cīrāma tēvaṉ Eḻuttu I
ppaṭikku Ivai muttaṉ cīraruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Irāca cuntaraṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai vēḷā
ṉ maṉṟaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai ti yakkal tātaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai tiruvaraṅkamāṉi Eḻuttu Ippaṭi
kku Ivai nāṭṭuttiruvaṭi paṇiyāl nāṭṭu kaṇakku tiruvempūruṭaiyāṉ ta ta yumuṭaiyāṉ nāṭṭāṉ Eḻuttuḥ—
Digital edition of SII 34.267 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
